detailed_description.text: The SFP to RJ45 Adapter, model UACC-CM-RJ45-1G, manufactured by Ubiquiti, is a versatile and compact device designed to enable seamless connectivity between small form-factor pluggable (SFP) transceiver modules and Ethernet devices equipped with RJ45 ports. This adapter serves as a bridge between fiber optic and copper-based Ethernet connections, facilitating flexible networking solutions in various environments.

- 1 Gbps throughput
- SFP to RJ45 adapter
- Supports connections up to 100 m*

The UACC-CM-RJ45-1G adapter is specifically engineered to support SFP transceiver modules that utilize copper-based connections, commonly known as SFP Copper modules or SFP RJ45 modules. These modules typically support data rates of up to 1 gigabit per second (Gbps) and are commonly used for short-distance Ethernet connections in networking equipment such as switches, routers, and media converters.

Featuring a compact and lightweight design, the UACC-CM-RJ45-1G adapter is easy to install and does not require any external power source. It is designed to fit seamlessly into standard SFP slots found in networking devices, allowing for quick and hassle-free integration into existing network infrastructures. The adapter is hot-swappable, meaning it can be inserted or removed from a device without the need to power down the equipment, minimizing downtime and disruption to network operations.

The UACC-CM-RJ45-1G adapter features an RJ45 connector on one end, which provides a familiar and standardized interface for connecting Ethernet devices such as computers, servers, printers, and IP cameras. This allows for easy integration of Ethernet-enabled devices into fiber optic-based networks, extending the reach of the network and enabling connectivity in locations where traditional Ethernet cabling may be impractical or cost-prohibitive.

On the other end, the adapter features an SFP receptacle that accepts compatible SFP transceiver modules. These modules typically support various networking standards and protocols, including Gigabit Ethernet, Fast Ethernet, and Ethernet over Copper (EoC), making them highly versatile and suitable for a wide range of networking applications.

The UACC-CM-RJ45-1G adapter is capable of supporting auto-negotiation and auto-sensing capabilities, allowing it to automatically detect and configure the appropriate network settings based on the connected devices. This ensures seamless interoperability between different networking equipment and simplifies the installation and configuration process for network administrators.
